mode: HERMEZ-PTAU + DRAND-ONLY BEACON. Phase 1: Hermez Perpetual Powers of Tau (publicly verifiable, multiple independent contributors). Phase 2: ONLY the drand League of Entropy beacon (round 6000000) — no human Phase-2 contributor, no human held or generated Phase-2 entropy. Publicly reproducible: anyone can re-derive this VK from 0000.zkey + the beacon value.

security_model: Phase 1 (Hermez PPOT): sound if any one PPOT contributor deleted their entropy. Phase 2: no human contributor at all — entropy is the drand beacon output, collectively produced by League of Entropy nodes (Cloudflare, EPFL, Protocol Labs, and others) and publicly verifiable on-chain. Forging a proof requires breaking BN254 discrete log. Unaudited open beta.
